(born 23 December 1947) is a Japanese former [wrestler](/wiki/Amateur_wrestling "Amateur wrestling") who competed in the [1972 Summer Olympics](/wiki/1972_Summer_Olympics "1972 Summer Olympics").[[1]](#cite_note-sref-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Japanese wrestler

**Akihiko Umeda** (born 23 December 1947) is a Japanese former [wrestler](/wiki/Amateur_wrestling "Amateur wrestling") who competed in the [1972 Summer Olympics](/wiki/1972_Summer_Olympics "1972 Summer Olympics").[[1]](#cite_note-sref-1)
